Background.occupation: Delivery driver for a major e-commerce company
Background.key_experience: Witnessed a workplace accident where a coworker was injured due to rushed delivery quotas, leading to increased anxiety about job security but no active advocacy for change

Cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - frequently adopts opinions from social media influencers and trending topics without critical evaluation
